name: EFF: Land and Economic Freedom
objective: Mobilize support for expropriation of land without compensation and industrialization.
mainMessage: Economic Freedom in Our Lifetime: Reclaiming our land and nationalizing our mines for the benefit of all.
talkingPoints: Land Expropriation: Dignity begins with land ownership.
Free Education: Quality higher education for the poor.
Minimum Wage: R12,500 across all sectors.
In-sourcing: Ending all security and cleaning tenders in government.

questions.prompt: Do you believe the current land distribution is fair?
Are you or anyone in your household unemployed?
Will you join the EFF command team as a volunteer?
